window_choice: Head-to-head on ECMWF overlap (2024-03..2025-12, 2 folds); full 2023-2025 (3 folds) reported as context for Ridge/GFS/analog.

anti_winner_shopping.fold_rule: candidate wins CP only if wins >=2/2 folds (ECMWF window) or >=2/3 (full window)
anti_winner_shopping.coverage_guard: candidate competes only if it has ALL-stratum metrics in the same folds as the incumbent; else coverage_ok=false and excluded from ranking
